commentaries.author: Clement Of Rome
commentaries.content: What I say: God will give thee understanding."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: The Lord will give thee understanding. In some Greek copies, may he give thee. (Witham)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: It is on this account that he has spoken these things in proverb and parable. Then again to show his affectionate disposition, he ceases not to pray for him, as fearing for his own son, and he says,

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
